summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.selfdev.genome.event; public class GenomeEvent { private String type; private String artifactId; private String topic; public GenomeEvent(String type, String artifactId, String topic) { this.type = type; this.artifactId = artifactId; this.topic = topic; } public String getType() { return type; } public String getArtifactId() { return artifactId; } public String getTopic() { return topic; } }
